productImage.label: Imagem do Produto
productImage.help: Adicione uma imagem do produto. Recomendado: proporção 16:9 (ex.: 800x450 px).

tagline.label: Tagline
tagline.help: Uma linha curta de marketing exibida abaixo do nome do projeto em cards e na página do projeto.
tagline.placeholder: ex.: Geração de imagens com IA, renderização perfeita de texto

tags.label: Tags do Produto
tags.help: Adicione até 10 tags para ajudar os usuários a descobrir seu projeto. Pressione Enter ou vírgula para adicionar.

platforms.label: Plataformas
platforms.help: Selecione todas as plataformas que seu projeto suporta.

metadata.title: Get Listed — Directory Pricing | aat.ee
metadata.description: Skip the queue, get a guaranteed dofollow link, and feature your project across our directory network: aat.ee + 11 partner sites.

hero.heading: Get your product seen across our directory network
hero.subheading: Skip the queue. Earn dofollow backlinks. Reach makers and early adopters across {n}+ curated sites with combined 700k+ monthly visitors.
hero.limited: Launch pricing — discounts shrink as our DR & traffic grow.

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: Get featured on aat.ee with a dofollow link. Your project also surfaces on related-product carousels, comparison pages, and alternatives pages — multiple discoverable touchpoints.

features.skipQueue: Skip the launch queue (no badge required)
features.extra: Bonus: appears in similar-product, compare, and alternatives pages

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: Everything in Basic, plus listings on HiCyou, MF8.BIZ, and BigKr. Combined network does 10,000+ Google clicks every 30 days and serves 300k+ monthly visitors.

features.fourSites: Listed on aat.ee, HiCyou, MF8.BIZ, BigKr
features.delivery: aat.ee live within 1 day · others within 3 business days

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Everything in Plus, plus friend-link placements on 8 high-authority documentation sites — strengthens GEO/AIEO recommendations and pushes your domain rating up. Combined network: 30,000+ Google clicks / 30 days, 700k+ monthly traffic.

features.docsSites: Friend-links on 8 docs sites: Debian Club, Ubuntu.fan, AlmaLinux, Run-EnTLinux, EOL.wiki, Rank.fan, LiteHttpd, PortcYou
features.geo: Boosts GEO/AIEO authority signals for AI-powered search
features.delivery: aat.ee live within 1 day · others within 3 business days

ultra.name: Ultra
ultra.subtitle: Sponsorship
ultra.tagline: Permanent sidebar visibility, every page, every visit.
ultra.description: Subscription. Includes everything in Pro, plus your sponsor card in the right sidebar of every aat.ee and HiCyou page — so every visitor sees your brand, on every project, every comparison, every alternative.
ultra.limit: Limited to 5 active sponsors at any time.

features.sidebar: Sponsor card on every aat.ee + HiCyou page

stats.heading: What you're buying access to
stats.trafficNote: Across all 12 sites. Numbers grow each month — that's also why discount prices won't last.
stats.drDisclaimer: Domain Rating values are pulled directly from Ahrefs and updated every 3 days. Higher DR sites pass more SEO authority through their dofollow links.

discount.a: We're scaling our directory network's authority. As our DR rises and traffic grows month over month, the value of a listing increases — so the discount price you see today won't be available in 3 months. Lock in the rate now.

delivery.a: aat.ee is automated — your listing goes live within 1 business day after payment. The other 11 sites are added manually within 3 business days. We'll email you when each placement is live.

retention.q: How long do the links stay up?
retention.a: All links and listings are intended to be permanent. We do not auto-expire one-time tier purchases. Sites we no longer operate may go offline in the future, but we'll email you in that rare case.

upgrade.a: Yes. Email us within 30 days of your purchase and we'll credit what you already paid toward the higher tier. After 30 days, you can buy the upgrade at the current rate.

refund.a: If we haven't yet placed your listing, full refund — just email us. After placement, we don't offer refunds since the link equity has been transferred. Ultra subscribers can cancel anytime; we pro-rate the unused portion of the current month.

multiple.q: Can I buy listings for multiple projects?
multiple.a: Yes — each project is a separate purchase. We don't currently offer bundled discounts, but heavy users should email us directly.

footer.heading: Ready to skip the queue?
footer.body: Pick a tier above and submit your project. Manual placements start within 1 business day.
